name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that is divisive, discriminatory, and factually inaccurate. He has repeatedly disparaged childless individuals, women, and minorities, using derogatory language and promoting policies that target these groups. Vance has also spread false information, including claims about Haitian immigrants eating pets, and has shown a willingness to "create stories" to get attention. Additionally, he has expressed opposition to abortion, same-sex marriage, and diversity, equity, and inclusion programs, and has aligned himself with hard-right ideologies and individuals. Vance's actions and statements suggest a disregard for facts, a lack of empathy, and a commitment to promoting a divisive and discriminatory agenda.

entries.fact: Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'

Vance said in a speech at a Center for Christian Virtue leadership meeting that childless teachers were 'trying to brainwash the minds of our children' and criticized American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten
Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children
JD Vance and Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison

Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
J.D. Vance opposed abortion, including in cases of rape.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance said the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023 would result in 'a reduced military in the face of a rising threat from China'
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump because he showed up' to Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance told critics of Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery to 'not do this fake outrage thing'

Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'

Vance alleged a 'massive rise in communicable diseases' in Springfield, but Clark County's health commissioner reported having 'not seen a substantial increase in all reportable communicable diseases'
Vance said that it was 'possible, of course, that all of these rumors will turn out to be false' regarding Haitian immigrants eating pets, but also told his supporters to 'keep the cat memes flowing'

Vance used the death of a child in Springfield, Ohio, to claim that the child was 'murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be here', despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles
JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing to create stories to get the American media's attention
JD Vance said he did not believe Trump lost the 2020 presidential election and that he believed 'Big Tech rigged the election' through censorship
JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that the moderators would not fact-check

JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that it's disrespectful for him to come to the Oval Office and try to litigate the conflict in front of the American media, and that Zelenskyy should be thanking President Trump for trying to bring an end to the conflict.

JD Vance incorrectly claimed that Zelenskyy went to Pennsylvania and campaigned for the opposition in October 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy had visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine.

JD Vance accused Zelenskyy of showing a 'propaganda tour' of Ukraine and asked whether Zelenskyy had ever offered thanks to President Trump, despite Zelenskyy starting the conversation by saying 'Thank you so much' to Trump.
JD Vance lamented that the globalist economy had caused the United States to borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture
J.D. Vance advised Trump to fire all civil servants and replace them with Trump supporters.
J.D. Vance argued against the need for rape and incest exceptions in abortion laws
J.D. Vance stated he would not support federal legislation to codify marriage equality and is against same-sex marriage
JD Vance voted against the bill to raise the debt ceiling
JD Vance opposed a bipartisan deal to avoid federal government default
JD Vance introduced a measure banning Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) in the federal government

JD Vance said that if he had been vice president during the 2020 presidential election, he would not have certified the results, suggesting some states Trump lost should have sent pro-Trump electors to Washington.
J.D. Vance proposed a federal ban on gender transition care for minors
J.D. Vance bragged about his 'mamaw's huge stash' of guns in an RNC speech, showcasing his stance against gun control.
JD Vance made a comment referring to some women as 'childless cat ladies', sparking widespread criticism
JD Vance argued for a higher tax rate on childless Americans in a 2021 interview
JD Vance has a history of disparaging people without kids, suggesting parents should have more voting power than non-parents.
J.D. Vance endorsed a book that calls far-left individuals 'unhumans' and praises fascist dictators
JD Vance introduced legislation to ban 'X' gender passports and dismantle federal DEI programs
Vance bashed a teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children in resurfaced remarks
JD Vance told Kamala Harris to 'go to hell' for criticism she did not actually give, regarding a cemetery
Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets
Vance spreads debunked claims about Haitian immigrants eating pets
Vance shared a social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, which the city refuted
Vance stuck by pet-eating claims and said he's willing to 'create stories'
JD Vance appeared at an event hosted by a hard-right Christian nationalist, sparking concerns about his associations
JD Vance claimed that Donald Trump did not lose the 2020 election, using ambiguous language
JD Vance said 'Judges Aren't Allowed to Control' Trump's 'Legitimate Power'
JD Vance brought a culture war to Europe with a speech at the Munich Security Conference
JD Vance told Greenlanders that their country is cold as 's---', and China's coming for them
JD Vance called Chinese people 'peasants'
JD Vance and Trump berated Zelensky in an Oval Office blowup
